calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-26-2017 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-06-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Douglas Voorsanger for Law Practice Administrator.

The Court requested the provision of a bank statement to substantiate the amount of funds remaining. Mr. Voorsanger stated that he would provide the bank statement as requested. The Court then expressed concern regarding the request to destroy original wills. Mr. Voorsanger replied that the wills in question were duplicate originals, intended to be merely as the attorney's file copies. The Court stated that provided the wills were originals, his preference would be for their lodging with the appropriate court(s) if the testators were unable to be contacted. Mr. Voorsanger responded that sometimes it can be a challenge to lodge wills with a court, but that he would endeavor to do so with the five or six remaining original wills in his possession. He agreed to prepare a revised order with language addressing the lodging ogf the wills. The Court granted the petition as modified, subject to receipt and review of the revised order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)

Petition For Order Appointing Law Practice Adminsitration And For Authority To Pay Law Practice Of Administrator
Off Calendar Sep-19-2016 Granted Per Written Order
